creator: kazubu@jtime.net
text:
In current implementation, IPV6_MINMTU is set in in6_gif_output and the encapsulated EtherIP packet is fragmented to 1280 bytes even if underlying network supports more than 1280 bytes MTU.
It is good for compatibility in small PMTU environments, however, performance is degraded.

I think it's better to have an option for increase MTU size for EtherIP over IPv6(Ethernet over gif).
